question: Will the product-announcement post exceed 100k shares in a week?

requirements.claim_or_quantity: If the total share count of the post at 2023-06-08T23:59:59Z is strictly greater than 100,000, then 'exceeds_100k'; otherwise 'does_not_exceed_100k'.
requirements.why_relevant: the terminal outcome standing as of the question date sets the base rate
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.80) driving the outcome distribution
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves

retrieval_plan.terms: product announcement post exceed 100k shares post author

retrieval_traces.logical_query: product announcement post exceed 100k shares post author after:2023-01-02 before:2023-06-01
